title: Create Your App
description: Build your app on top of Convex SaaS, explore the documentation, and start your journey.
messageActionErrorNoContent: There is no content to create a story from.
toastSegmentsGenerationFailed: Failed to generate scenes. Please try again.
generateSegmentsTooltip: After editing, generate all scene images for the story.
orientationDescription: Vertical is great for mobile. Horizontal is best for desktop and TV.
orientationWarning: Note: Once set, the orientation cannot be changed unless you regenerate all images.
noSegmentsInStory: This story doesn't have any scenes yet.
confirmDeleteSegmentTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this scene?
confirmDeleteSegmentDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the scene and all its image versions.
placeholderSegmentDescription: Enter a description for this scene...
toastUploadProcessingFailed: Failed to process upload. Please try again.
toastFileTooLarge: File is too large. Please upload an image under 5MB.
toastUploadFailed: Upload failed. Please check the console for details.
uploaderDragDrop: Drag & drop or click to upload
toastNoVersionSelected: Please select a version to edit first.
quickEditDescription: Make small, incremental changes to the current image. Best for fine-tuning details.
editPromptPlaceholder: e.g., Make him smile / Change to a night scene with a moon / Give him sunglasses / Turn into a Van Gogh style oil painting
editPromptError: Please select a version from the history panel to start editing.
regenerateDescription: Create a completely new image based on a detailed description. This will not use the current image.
styleStudioSimpleDescription: Describe the overall artistic style you want for your entire story. This will guide the AI in generating every scene.
visualStylePromptPlaceholder:
e.g., Ghibli animation style, summer, nostalgic and warm...
e.g., Cyberpunk, neon lights, rainy Tokyo streets...
e.g., Dark fantasy, gothic architecture, somber atmosphere...
visualStylePromptHint: The more descriptive you are, the better the AI can understand your vision. This style will be applied to the entire story.
